name: neighbor_k_active_200d
description: 200 days forces len(distances) > neighbor_k (150), exercising the np.argpartition branch. This pins the neighbor-selection path and ensures the default neighbor_k (proposed MC_DEFAULT_NEIGHBOR_K) is wired correctly after extraction.
derivation: Re-captured from the fixed producer at branch fix/mc-knn-exit-gate HEAD 7ff61a4 (Cluster 2) with run_monte_carlo(..., seed=42). Exercises the argpartition branch (len(eligible distances) still > neighbor_k=150 after the AC-4 early-window exclusion drops 19 of the 200 days). The value shifted from the pre-Cluster-2 66.76 because AC-1 standardizes the kNN feature vector and AC-4 trims the candidate pool — both intentionally change neighbour selection. The expected value is the EXACT float repr of the producer output ((paths-below)/paths*100 = some integer/5000*100 carries a representation residual); the zero-tolerance pin requires the exact repr. Provenance: captured-from-the-fixed-producer.
